About

Nicole St Ange

Seychellois by birth, global by experience — bringing world-class expertise back to the islands she calls home.

Her Story

Born in Seychelles,
Shaped by the World

Nicole St Ange was born and raised in Seychelles, giving her an intimate understanding of the islands, their communities, and their property landscape that no expatriate agent can replicate.

After gaining extensive experience in Australia and Italy — two of the world's most competitive property markets — Nicole returned to Seychelles over 11 years ago, bringing with her an international perspective and a certified auctioneer's precision.

Her unique position — a Seychellois national with global luxury market experience — makes her the natural choice for international buyers seeking Seychelles property.

Certified Auctioneer — trained in Australia's competitive luxury property sector
Over 11 years back in Seychelles, building an unrivalled island-wide network
International experience spanning Australia and Italy's luxury real estate markets
Full coverage across Mahé, Praslin, and La Digue — sales, leases, and commercial

Mission

Connecting people
with their paradise

Nicole's mission is to make buying, selling, or leasing property in Seychelles seamless, transparent, and rewarding. She believes every client deserves honest guidance and exceptional service at every stage of their property journey.

Vision

Seychelles property
done right

Nicole envisions a Seychelles property market accessible to serious international buyers while remaining true to the islands' values. Her goal is to be the most trusted real estate name across the Seychelles archipelago.

Your Guide

Nicole St Ange

Born and raised in Seychelles, with over a decade of luxury real estate experience spanning Australia, Italy, and the islands — Nicole shares her insights on the Seychelles property market, investment opportunities, and island living.

November 2024 · 5 min read

A guide to property ownership rules, IIA permits, and the buying process for non-Seychellois nationals.
October 2024 · 4 min read
La Digue: Why the World's Most Beautiful Island Is Also Its Best Investment
With limited land and growing demand, La Digue property values show consistent appreciation.
September 2024 · 6 min read
Long-Term vs. Short-Term Rental in Seychelles: Maximising Your Return
Whether leasing to expats or holiday tourists, we break down the numbers and strategy.
August 2024 · 3 min read
Seychelles Market Update: Mid-Year Property Trends 2024
Sales volumes, price movements, and emerging hotspots across Mahé, Praslin, and La Digue.

Building Your Dream Home in Seychelles: A Step-by-Step Guide
From finding the right plot to navigating planning permissions — everything you need to know.

Nicole compares lifestyle, connectivity, property types, and investment potential.
